# CWE-502: user-controlled gob payload decoded into privileged action struct.
lang: go
file: CWE-502-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/gob"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type adminAction struct {
	UserID uint
	Grant  string
}

func ApplyPrivilege(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
	var action adminAction
	_ = gob.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(raw)).Decode(&action)
	db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", action.Grant, action.UserID)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
